name: Tandy
equipment: The Crowd Pleaser (+1 Greataxe - glowing audience-rating counter in haft)
Crawler Biscuit of Supreme Healing (8d4+8 HP) x2
features: Frenzy (bonus action attack while raging, exhaustion after)
Smush Mastery (can train Smush to level 20)
- Human Shield (use grabbed enemies as armor)
- Fastball Special (throw allies safely at enemies)
- Siege Engine (thrown enemies deal damage on impact)
bonds: My clan was destroyed. I will find those responsible.
flaws: Violence is my answer to almost any challenge.
ideals: Glory - I must earn fame in battle.
traits: I laugh in the face of danger. Literally. Loudly.
notes: PARTY: Joined Carl and Princess Donut on Floor 2
PARTY ROLE: Primary melee damage dealer, siege weapon, ally-thrower
Travels with Carl (human tank), Donut (cat caster), Mongo (dinosaur pet), and Mordecai (manager)
RACE CHANGE: Transformed from Mountain Dwarf to Sasquatch on Floor 3
CLASS CHANGE: Became Living Siege Weapon on Floor 3
Now 9ft tall, extremely dense muscle, fur, massive feet, fangs
INT of 1 means very simple thoughts - instinct over intellect
